items.title_en: Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'on life support' after rejecting Tehran's counterproposal
items.title_zh: 特朗普在拒绝德黑兰的反提议后表示，伊朗停火已“维持生命”
items.desc_en: The testy U.S.-Iran ceasefire began in mid-April after Trump threatened to destroy Iran's "whole civilization" if no deal was struck.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普威胁称，如果不达成协议，将摧毁伊朗的“整个文明”，美伊停火于四月中旬开始。

items.title_en: The stock market has only done this 3 times in nearly 40 years. It's not a good sign
items.title_zh: 近40年来，股市只出现过3次这样的情况。这不是一个好兆头
items.desc_en: The poor breadth in the stock market is drawing comparisons to the late 1990s, and worrying investors.
items.desc_zh: 股市的广度不佳与 20 世纪 90 年代末相比，令投资者感到担忧。

items.title_en: GM cutting hundreds of salaried IT workers as it cuts costs, evaluates needs
items.title_zh: 通用汽车削减了数百名受薪 IT 员工，以削减成本、评估需求
items.desc_en: General Motors is laying off hundreds of salaried employees in its information technology operations.
items.desc_zh: 通用汽车正在解雇其信息技术业务部门的数百名受薪员工。

items.title_zh: 特朗普表示他的目标是“一段时间内”暂停征收汽油税 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_en: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella takes stand in Musk v. Altman trial
items.title_zh: 微软首席执行官萨蒂亚·纳德拉 (Satya Nadella) 在马斯克诉奥特曼案中出庭作证
items.desc_en: Elon Musk named Microsoft as a defendant in his lawsuit against OpenAI
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 在针对 OpenAI 的诉讼中将微软列为被告

items.title_en: JPMorgan Chase-led bank group reins in credit line to troubled KKR private credit fund as losses mount
items.title_zh: 由于损失不断增加，摩根大通领导的银行集团限制了陷入困境的 KKR 私人信贷基金的信贷额度
items.desc_en: The KKR fund, often referred to by its ticker, FSK, has become one of the most visible fault lines in the private credit story.
items.desc_zh: KKR 基金（通常以其股票代码 FSK 提及）已成为私人信贷故事中最明显的断层线之一。

items.title_en: Trump invites Elon Musk, Tim Cook, Larry Fink and other CEOs to join China trip for Xi summit
items.title_zh: 特朗普邀请埃隆·马斯克、蒂姆·库克、拉里·芬克等首席执行官赴华出席习近平峰会
items.desc_en: Trump invited Tesla's Elon Musk, Apple's Tim Cook and Blackrock's Larry Fink to join his China trip for talks with Xi Jinping on trade, AI and geopolitics.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普邀请特斯拉的埃隆·马斯克、苹果的蒂姆·库克和贝莱德的拉里·芬克参加他的中国之行，与习近平就贸易、人工智能和地缘政治进行会谈。

items.title_en: Michael Burry is not a believer: 'For any stocks going parabolic reduce positions almost entirely'
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 不相信：“对于任何呈抛物线走势的股票，头寸几乎都会减少”
items.desc_en: Michael Burry said investors should "reject greed" as enthusiasm around artificial intelligence and momentum-driven trades pushes valuations sharply higher.
items.desc_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，投资者应该“拒绝贪婪”，因为对人工智能和动力驱动交易的热情推动估值大幅上涨。

items.title_en: Former Tesla CFO Deepak Ahuja joins EV battery recycler Redwood Materials
items.title_zh: 特斯拉前首席财务官 Deepak Ahuja 加入电动汽车电池回收公司 Redwood Materials
items.desc_en: Before joining Redwood Materials, Ahuja served as chief financial and business officer at the drone delivery startup Zipline for about three years.
items.desc_zh: 在加入 Redwood Materials 之前，Ahuja 在无人机送货初创公司 Zipline 担任首席财务和业务官约三年。

items.title_en: Chip stocks continue to surge. Here's how to buy one for less
items.title_zh: 芯片股继续飙升。以下是如何以更低的价格购买一件
items.desc_en: The immediate impulse might be to jump in the chip rally. If you're in that camp, a more measured approach might be to use options and risk less capital.
items.desc_zh: 直接的冲动可能是参与筹码上涨。如果你属于这个阵营，更谨慎的方法可能是使用期权和风险较小的资本。

items.title_en: The wealthy keep buying Manhattan real estate despite potential pied-à-terre tax

items.desc_en: Real estate sales in Manhattan worth $4 million or more increased in the past month, according to Olshan Realty.
items.desc_zh: Olshan Realty 的数据显示，上个月曼哈顿价值 400 万美元或以上的房地产销售额增长了。

items.title_zh: 泰国分裂的前总理出狱了，但他信时代结束了吗？
items.desc_en: Thaksin seems incapable of taking a back seat. This time, it really could be different.
items.desc_zh: 他信似乎无法退居二线。这一次，情况可能真的会有所不同。

items.title_en: Oil prices jump after Trump dismisses Iran proposal to end war
items.title_zh: 特朗普驳回伊朗结束战争的提议后油价上涨
items.desc_en: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡水道仍然有效关闭，严重扰乱了全球能源运输。

items.title_en: Ailing Iran Nobel laureate given bail and hospital transfer
items.title_zh: 患病的伊朗诺贝尔奖获得者获得保释并转院

items.desc_zh: 伊朗当局准许人权活动家纳尔吉斯·穆罕默迪保释，因为人们越来越担心她在监狱中的健康状况不佳。

items.title_en: Iranian activist tells BBC how fear of war restarting intensifies trauma of repression

items.desc_zh: 德黑兰的一名持不同政见者表示，她感到无助并承受着巨大的心理压力。
